creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
And a confirmation that poudriere (still) cannot build editors/abiword inder stable/12 (amd64):

FreeBSD freebeast.catwhisker.org 12.2-STABLE FreeBSD 12.2-STABLE #1105 r368554M/368577: Sat Dec 12 03:35:32 PST 2020     root@freebeast.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64 1202504 1202504

As the (uncompressed) log is 3084756 bytes, you may find a copy of it in http://www.catwhisker.org/~david/FreeBSD/ports/abiword/ -- this one is abiword-3.0.4.log .  (There is also an earlier abiword-3.0.1_17.log, documenting its failure to build under poudriere, as well.)  There are also gzipped copies.
